insight: Gauss Cannon in a set with good soak and absorbers can inadvertently make it a blood pact (BP) set by making early pressure more valuable.
author: spiritfryer
context: Observation on how Gauss Cannon affects set archetypes.

insight: Buying units that convert meaningless attack (attack that won't damage anything) into HP is valuable when opponent has a large future paycheck coming and you need to hold out long enough.
author: spiritfryer
context: Situational use of defense-conversion units in delayed-threat scenarios.
